name: torque-loop
description: Torque Loop evolves ambiguous work into shipped, tested, serialized artifacts through evidence-gated loops.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-gated workflow skills and ratchet state helpers
interface.longDescription: Use Torque Loop to lock vague goals, rank blockers, build small artifacts, attack assumptions, patch failures, serialize state, and run bounded evidence-gated evolution loops.
defaultPrompt: Use Torque Loop to lock and ship this task.
Run an evidence-gated evolve pass on this file.
Attack this plan and patch only what fails.
